items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that photo documentation is linked to the signature. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
